merged_events.event_description: The United States established diplomatic relations with Czechia and the American Embassy in Prague opened, with Ambassador Adrian A. Basora (previously Ambassador to the CSFR) serving as the first Ambassador to Czechia.

evidence.quote: The United States established diplomatic relations with Czechia on January 1, 1993.
Ambassador Adrian A. Basora, who had served as Ambassador to the CSFR since June 1992, served as Ambassador to Czechia from January 1, 1993 until July 15, 1995.

matched.notes: Perfect match. Both record the establishment of the U.S. Embassy in Prague on 1993-01-01, following the dissolution of Czechoslovakia (CSFR). High-confidence RDCR source with verified citations.
